name: c909f337-dd19-418d-8c30-2d46c92c6035
description: Simulated user completes a full reservation with readback confirmations. Tests the entire slot machine pipeline including two-phase commit.
evaluationDatasets: Bella Notte Slot Machine - Full Suite

scenario.task: Make a dinner reservation at Bella Notte for 4 people on June 17th, 2026. When asked for a time, choose 7 PM. The reservation name is Garcia. No special requests. When the agent reads back information and asks you to confirm, say 'yes' or 'that's correct'.
rubrics: The agent must collect all 5 pieces of information: party size, date, time, name, and special requests.
The agent must read back each piece of information and ask for confirmation before proceeding.
The agent must be warm and inviting, like a restaurant host.
